description:
Specification

Product Information

Product Type :Single Box Product

Product Name:Retro Makeup Desk with Large Mirror, 3-Drawer Dressing Table for Jewelry Storage, Elegant Console Table for Bedroom, Living Room, Hallway & Foyer,White

Main Color:White

Main Material:Engineered Wood

Product Dimensions

Assembled Length (in.):39.30

Assembled Width (in.):15.80

Assembled Height (in.):29.80

Product Weight (lbs.):50.90

Package Size

Length (in.):43.65

Width (in.):27.45

Height (in.):12.70

Weight (lbs.):63.27

Product Features

  • Elegant Large Mirror:The octagonal mirror with an engraved frame and silver finish is both exquisite and fashionable. It perfectly matches the dressing table and can also be used separately in the bedroom or bathroom, adding a touch of sophistication to any space.
  • Spacious Storage:The smooth tabletop provides ample space for displaying decorations or frequently used items. This vanity desk features versatile storage with one large drawer and two smaller ones, including an exquisite jewelry storage plate. It’s ideal for organizing essentials, enhancing both functionality and style in your room.
  • Unique Design:The makeup desk is exquisitely crafted with a chic distressed white finish and detailed carved accents, offering a blend of vintage charm and modern luxury for your home decor.
  • Durable and Sturdy Construction:Crafted from high-quality MDF and solid wood, this vanity desk is built to last. The solid wood legs provide a stable foundation, ensuring long-term durability. The surface is coated with a glossy lacquer that offers a smooth finish, resists corrosion, and protects against insects.
  • Versatile and Space-Saving:Measuring 39.3"L x 15.8"W x 29.8"H, this slim and stylish desk is perfect for a variety of spaces, including bedrooms, bathrooms, living rooms, or hallways. Its compact design makes it ideal for small spaces.

Descriptions

Vanity With Mirror And Jewelry Tray

The vanity desk has an octagonal mirror, and the frame is carved with silver floral pattern. The velvet jewelry tray in the central drawer is pefect for storing jewelry and small make up items.

New Designed Drawers

The desk has three drawers, the central drawer has a refined fluted bar pull and the other two has flower-shaped handles. The drawer panel is also carved on the edge. All the details are well disigned with quality.

Double-edge Desktop

The vanity has a wide desktop in 39.4 inch wide and 15.7 inch deep. The two-layer edge ensures safty and good-looking.

Exquisite Desk Legs

The make up table has four elegent legs made of solid wood. There is also intricate carvings on them.
